summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 bugs for CrossCurrent Finance Center. All three P0 bugs have been verified as FIXED. Backend APIs pass 100% (11/11 tests). Frontend E2E tests confirm all features work correctly.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 error due to missing profit_points field in old trading signals
minor.status: FIXED - Added backward compatibility for missing fields

issues: Onboarding tour modal blocks navigation - user must dismiss it first (expected behavior)

passed_tests: PROB-1: Login persistence - User stays logged in after page refresh ✓
DM-1: Add new debt - Add Debt button opens modal, form submits successfully ✓
PPL-1: Add new goal - Add Goal button opens modal, form submits successfully ✓
Auth/Me endpoint returns user data with valid token ✓
Navigation between pages maintains login state ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/trade/active-signal was missing backward compatibility for old signals without profit_points field

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All P0 bug fixes verified via E2E testing

seed_data_creation: Created test debts and goals during E2E testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bugs verified fixed: 1) Login persistence works via localStorage token storage, 2) POST /api/debt creates debts successfully, 3) POST /api/goals creates goals successfully. Fixed a minor issue with /api/trade/active-signal returning 500 due to missing profit_points field in old signals. The onboarding tour modal appears on first visit and must be dismissed before navigating.

mocked_apis_list: Heartbeat user verification - non-blocking for development
